description: Call with a homeowner considering listing their property

rapport_building.description: Agent builds genuine rapport before discussing business. References something personal or local.

seller_motivation.description: Agent uncovers the seller's true motivation for selling — not just 'what's your timeline?'

pricing_conversation.description: Agent handles pricing expectations diplomatically — neither overprices to win the listing nor underprices without explanation.

marketing_plan_presented.description: Agent explains their specific marketing plan with concrete tactics, not generic promises.

competition_awareness.description: Agent references current market conditions and comparable properties to set expectations.

objection_handling.description: Agent responds to commission or timing objections with confidence and a clear value argument.

listing_appointment_ask.description: Agent asks directly for the listing appointment or for a decision by a specific date.

follow_up_plan.description: Agent establishes a clear follow-up plan if the seller is not ready to decide.
